title: acinodendron quadrangulare
intro: Acinodendron quadrangulare, also known as the Brazilian guava or white guava, is a flowering plant native to Brazil, characterized by its white, fragrant flowers and red or yellow fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acinodendron quadrangulare include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Acinodendron quadrangulare can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical and cosmetic products.
